# hooks-management skill

## Description

Provides methods and scripts for managing git hooks in the repository. Covers installation, verification, and integration with contributor flows.

## Features

- Install all git hooks from scripts/hooks/

- Verify hooks are installed

- Used by contributors to ensure pre-commit and other hooks are active

## Usage

- Use the provided script to install or check hooks:

```sh
  python scripts/install-hooks.py
  python scripts/install-hooks.py --check
```

- Integrate with onboarding and contributor docs.

## Tools

- `scripts/install-hooks.py` — main hook installation script
